title: Cierre formal del ciclo 00–18 y release técnico interno
wave: Ola 0 — Cierre y estabilización del ciclo 00–18
pass_criteria: Release manifest exists and references no runtime output as source artifact.
Clean ZIP excludes runtime outputs, caches, .git, .venv and .devpilot/devpilot.db.
block_criteria: Release package includes outputs runtime or .devpilot/devpilot.db.
Documentation claims planned/disabled/future capabilities as implemented.
Traceability between release and sprints 00-18 is missing.
External dependency or network call is introduced without ADR.
risks: This release is technical/internal and not a final product distribution.
SHA256 checksums provide integrity evidence but do not replace signing.
No new core capability is introduced by FUNC-SPRINT-19.
Release packaging is generated outside the repo and is not itself stored in this manifest.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-20 — Reconciliación documental post-18 y roadmap vivo
